---
title: "Home"
---

Description of problem:

-   Slides are in the slides folder.
-   Currently `slides.scss` has two copies in the repo:
    1.  in the `slides` folder
    2.  in the root of the repo
-   With this repetition the slides render using the correct styling (titles are red) whether you click on *Render* when editing `deck1.qmd` or click on *Render Website* in the **Build** tab.
-   I'd like to have only one copy of `slides.scss` in the repo and have both render options work.
